summary: Settings Hub Sidebar Redesign fully tested. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified for Settings Hub sidebar navigation, Content Studio, Sales Content Hub, and Business Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Well-structured sidebar with 15 sections using TABS array and TAB_DESCRIPTIONS object
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Sidebar hidden on mobile (hidden lg:block), mobile uses fixed bottom tab bar
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Content panel limited to max-w-3xl for readability
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Toast notifications via sonner replace alert() calls
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Active tab highlighted with bg-[#20364D] text-white styling
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: GET/PUT endpoints properly merge with PLATFORM_DEFAULTS
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: invalidate_settings_cache() called on save for cache consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub uses sidebar navigation with 15 sections. Staff login is at /staff-login (not /admin/login). Sales Content Hub at /staff/content-hub shows 13 products with images. Content Studio at /admin/content-studio shows 26 products.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/settings-hub: Returns all settings sections (business_profile, payment_accounts, branding, commercial, operational_rules, sales, affiliate, payouts, progress_workflows, partner_policy, notifications, launch_controls)
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/settings-hub: Saves settings and persists changes correctly
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/business-settings: Returns business settings with logo/stamp fields

settings_hub_sidebar.Page loads: Settings Hub page at /admin/settings-hub loads with sidebar
settings_hub_sidebar.Sidebar visible: Left sidebar with 15 sections visible on desktop (lg+)
settings_hub_sidebar.All 15 tabs present: Business Profile, Payment Details, Document Branding, Preview, Pricing Policy, Commercial Rules, Operational Rules, Sales & Commissions, Affiliate & Referrals, Payout Settings, Workflows & Vendors, Partner Policy, Notifications, Report Delivery, Launch Controls
settings_hub_sidebar.Tab switching: Clicking sidebar items switches content panel correctly
settings_hub_sidebar.Title updates: Page title and subtitle update when switching sections
settings_hub_sidebar.Content max-width: Content panel has max-w-3xl for readability
settings_hub_sidebar.Save Settings button: Works and shows toast 'Settings saved successfully'
settings_hub_sidebar.Active tab styling: Active tab highlighted with dark background and white text

content_studio_regression.Theme selectors: Light, Dark Premium, Promotional, Clean Minimal themes work
content_studio_regression.Creative preview drawer: Opens when clicking product, shows branded template
content_studio_regression.Copy caption buttons: 4 caption types available (Short, Social, WhatsApp, Story)

sales_content_hub_regression.Page loads: Sales Content Hub at /staff/content-hub loads correctly

business_settings_regression.Logo upload: Company Logo section with Replace button visible
business_settings_regression.Stamp upload: Company Stamp/Seal section with Replace button visible
